description: MoQT implementation registry for interop testing

moq-rs.name: moq-rs
moq-rs.notes: Rust implementation. Test client reference implementation.

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-rs/build.sh && docker tag moq-relay-ietf:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-relay-ietf:latest
Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-rs/build.sh && docker tag moq-test-client:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-test-client:latest

moq-rs-draft-16.name: moq-rs (draft-16)
moq-rs-draft-16.notes: Rust implementation. Draft-16 branch from itzmanish (Manish Pandit), based on https://github.com/cloudflare/moq-rs/pull/131.

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-rs/build.sh --repo https://github.com/itzmanish/moq-rs --ref draft-16 --target relay && docker tag moq-relay-ietf:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-relay-ietf-draft-16:latest

Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-rs/build.sh --repo https://github.com/itzmanish/moq-rs --ref draft-16 --target client && docker tag moq-test-client:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-test-client-draft-16:latest

moxygen.name: moxygen
moxygen.notes: C++ implementation. Supports multiple draft versions simultaneously via version negotiation.

docker.notes: Adapter wraps upstream image with /certs convention

moqx.name: moqx
moqx.notes: C++ relay built on moxygen. Supports multiple draft versions via version negotiation.

moq-dev-rs.name: moq (moq-dev)
moq-dev-rs.notes: Rust implementation by kixelated, supports moq-lite and IETF MoQT. Supports multiple draft versions via version negotiation.

docker.notes: Adapter wraps upstream image with /certs convention
Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-dev-rs/build.sh && docker tag moq-dev-rs-client:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-dev-rs-client:latest

moq-dev-js.name: moq (moq-dev, JS)
moq-dev-js.notes: Bun/TypeScript test client using @moq/lite npm package with @moq/web-transport polyfill. Supports multiple draft versions via version negotiation.

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/moq-dev-js/build.sh && docker tag moq-dev-js-client:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-moq-dev-js-client:latest

moqtransport.name: moqtransport
moqtransport.notes: Go implementation. No persistent public relay.

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR. To build from source: ./builds/quiche-moq/build.sh && docker tag quiche-moq-relay:latest ghcr.io/englishm/moq-interop-runner-quiche-moq-relay:latest

imquic.name: imquic
imquic.notes: C implementation. Supports draft-17 and draft-16 via negotiation. Versions below draft-16 were dropped when draft-17 support was added (March 2026).

xquic.name: xquic
xquic.notes: C implementation. Raw QUIC transport only (moqt://).

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR (amd64). To build from source: ./builds/xquic/build.sh --target relay
Pre-built on GHCR (amd64). To build from source: ./builds/xquic/build.sh --target client

aiomoqt.name: aiomoqt
aiomoqt.notes: Python asyncio implementation of MoQT. Supports draft-14 and draft-16 via version negotiation.

docker.notes: Pre-built on GHCR from the upstream repo (see Dockerfile at the repo root). Available in :latest and :<version> tags.

_comment_how_to_add: 1. Add a new key under 'implementations' with a unique ID
2. Fill in metadata: name, organization, repository, draft_versions
3. Add 'roles' object with supported roles (relay, client, publisher, subscriber)
- 'docker': image name, build info, and any adapter needed
- 'remote': array of endpoints with transport type (quic or webtransport)
6. If your image needs an adapter to support /certs convention,
create adapter in adapters/<name>/ (see adapters/moxygen/ for an example)
